queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the determinants of default associated with negative checking account balances and their contribution to elevated credit risk drivers.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Investigation of the determinants of default linked to the absence of a checking account and its role as a significant credit risk driver in consumer lending.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: no known savings account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the determinants of default associated with the absence of a known savings account and its observed role in mitigating credit risk exposure.
